title: Rich Shattering American Chocolate Pie
description: Fresh, shattering, comforting American dish featuring dark chocolate, en-croite, and low-sodium-friendly options.

ingredients.name: Graham Cracker Crust
ingredients.notes: homemade or store-bought, low-sodium option available

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together melted butter and sugar until well combined.
Add the eggs one at a time, whisking well after each addition.
Melt the dark chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Whisk the melted chocolate into the sugar mixture until smooth.
Pour the chocolate mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust.
Bake the pie for 45 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let the pie cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
Chill the pie in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Once chilled, remove the pie from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
